# **The Catalyst for Transformation.**
CHANGE denotes the positive evolution of emerging and frontier markets. We invest in the human spirit's power to aspire, create, and build.
[ What we do ](https://www.changegi.com/how-we-invest)
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/69a5f55b8659f024d9e96d3d/70c0e7fe-85e1-47e2-b5ce-a079229f1433/Frame+3.png)
## Global Expertise, Local Roots
CHANGE Global Investment is an asset management firm focused on uncovering pricing inefficiencies in the developing world.
We manage public equity strategies for pension funds, foundations, and family offices worldwide.
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/69a5f55b8659f024d9e96d3d/3ef441d2-f9f7-4450-9737-9dd3bdb9c3dd/Firefly_GeminiFlash_Cinematic+editorial+photo+of+wind+turbines+near+a+small+growing+city+in+a+developing++17205.png)
## Beyond the Index
Our team was born and raised in the markets we invest in. This firsthand experience provides a cultural fluency that index-based vehicles simply cannot match.
We don't just analyze markets; we understand the people behind the growth.
##  **Active Management.****Proven Vision.**
Capitalizing on the advancement of emerging and frontier countries.
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/69a5f55b8659f024d9e96d3d/97e27d4b-f889-4859-927f-34e8f7e03833/Firefly_GeminiFlash_High-altitude+aerial+photograph+of+a+massive+container+port+with+hundreds+of+colorful+94436.png)
**Early-Stage Focus.**
Identifying strong ideas before they reach the mainstream.
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/69a5f55b8659f024d9e96d3d/8d046faf-cb39-429b-b48f-f9e8d8b0637e/Firefly_GeminiFlash_Cinematic+editorial+drone+photograph+of+a+large+infrastructure+project+under+construc+94436.png)
**Strategic Positioning.**
Diversified strategies designed to perform differently than the competition.
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/69a5f55b8659f024d9e96d3d/1773867167970-3KHSQIEVKU4EV4OI6SS5/unsplash-image-lFv0V3_2H6s.jpg)
**Risk Mitigation.**
# Recent Media & Insights
[ ![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/69a5f55b8659f024d9e96d3d/fa34ea25-b8c4-4ce3-a3a8-86ecaa797660/Screenshot+2026-04-08+145958.png) ](https://www.cnbc.com/video/2026/03/17/china-outperforms-despite-reliance-on-mideast-oil-portfolio-manager.html)
#### **China an outperformer despite reliance on Middle East oil**
Thea Jamison, Managing Director at CHANGE Global Investment, shares her preferred China stocks and sectors that have held up despite volatility from the Middle East conflict. She also remains bullish on other Asian emerging markets.
[ ![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/69a5f55b8659f024d9e96d3d/faea1a84-433e-4a01-ae38-8d7331dc13fc/Bloomberg+TV+New+York+w+Romaine+December+2025.png) ](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/videos/2025-12-19/emerging-markets-starting-bull-cycle-jamison-video)
#### **Emerging Markets Starting Bull Cycle: Jamison**
Thea Jamison, founder and managing director of CHANGE Global, says the firm believes emerging markets are still in the early stages of a cycle, citing improving fundamentals, signs of shifting capital flows, and compelling valuations.
[ ![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/69a5f55b8659f024d9e96d3d/f8fc2e96-2bca-4e68-b2b7-95d089d7c327/LOU30633+%282%29.jpg) ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2mNefHtKnrw)
#### **Sohn Conference NY 2026 - Emerging Markets Reimagined**
At Sohn New York CHANGE Global’s Founder, Thea Jamison, made the case for emerging markets, thematic opportunities, and three stock picks. Watch the full pitch here: [**https://lnkd.in/eThmZiZe**](https://lnkd.in/eThmZiZe)
